name: Honey Chipotle Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all sauce ingredients except the oil in a blender or food processor.
2. Add oil while running the blender to chop and incorporate the mixture.
3. Brush the sauce on both sides of 5-oz skinless, boneless chicken breasts.
4. Grill the chicken for 6-7 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
5. Serve additional sauce over top of each piece of chicken.
6. This dish is also excellent with grilled shrimp.
